name: OpenClaw (Ubuntu)
postCreateCommand:
node --version && npm --version && (command -v pnpm >/dev/null && pnpm --version || true) && printf '
%s
%s

' 'OpenClaw gateway: no systemd in this dev container — start with: openclaw gateway run' 'Control UI URL (clipboard often unavailable here): node scripts/print-openclaw-dashboard-url.js'
